nasb.text: Abijah and his people defeated them with a great slaughter, so that 500,000 chosen men of Israel fell slain.

esv.text: Abijah and his people struck them with great force, so there fell slain of Israel 500,000 chosen men.

cnv.text: 亞比雅和他的人民大大地擊殺以色列人；以色列人中倒斃的精兵共有五十萬。

ccb.text: 亚比雅和他的军队大败以色列人，歼灭了他们五十万精兵。
